title: pristimera scheffleri
intro: Pristimera scheffleri, also known as the Schefflera plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to New Guinea. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pristimera scheffleri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
